search_query: how to get better at sports
retrieved_result: Why are there so many violins in a symphony orchestra, and when did the current number become standard? "Tobin Sparfeld, Conductor, Baritone, www.tobinsparfeld.com Updated Jan 18, 2016 · Author has 66 answers and 575.5k answer views Violins are the most important instruments in the orchestra. They are the highest-sounding of the string instruments, which also contain violas, cellos, and string basses."
Decision_Reason: The page discusses violins in an orchestra, not strategies or methods for getting better at sports; it is off-topic regarding the search query.
